criteria_verification.criterion_text: `llm.call` event emitted for every successful SDK invocation
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented _emit_llm_call_event() method called in the finally block of _invoke_with_role(). On success path, status='ok' and error_type=None. Test: test_emits_event_on_successful_call verifies event emission with NullEmitter(capture=True).
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented _emit_llm_call_event() method called in the finally block of _invoke_with_role(). On success path, status='ok' and error_type=None. Test: test_emits_event_on_successful_call verifies event emission with NullEmitter(capture=True).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `llm.call` event emitted for failed SDK invocations (timeout, API error)
criteria_verification.evidence: Error path sets call_status='error' and captures the exception. Event is emitted in finally block regardless of success/failure. Tests: test_emits_event_on_timeout (verifies timeout error emission with error_type='timeout') and test_emits_event_on_process_error (verifies ProcessError emission).
criteria_verification.notes: Error path sets call_status='error' and captures the exception. Event is emitted in finally block regardless of success/failure. Tests: test_emits_event_on_timeout (verifies timeout error emission with error_type='timeout') and test_emits_event_on_process_error (verifies ProcessError emission).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Event includes all required fields: run_id, task_id, agent_role, provider, model, tokens, latency, prompt_profile, status
criteria_verification.evidence: LLMCallEvent constructed with all required fields in _emit_llm_call_event(). run_id from self._run_id or instance ID fallback, task_id extracted from prompt, agent_role from method param, provider from detect_provider(), model from param, tokens from extract_token_usage(), latency from measure_latency(), prompt_profile from self._prompt_profile or default, status from call tracking. Test: test_event_includes_all_required_fields asserts all fields.
criteria_verification.notes: LLMCallEvent constructed with all required fields in _emit_llm_call_event(). run_id from self._run_id or instance ID fallback, task_id extracted from prompt, agent_role from method param, provider from detect_provider(), model from param, tokens from extract_token_usage(), latency from measure_latency(), prompt_profile from self._prompt_profile or default, status from call tracking. Test: test_event_includes_all_required_fields asserts all fields.

criteria_verification.evidence: Event emission uses asyncio.get_running_loop().create_task(_safe_emit()) — fire-and-forget pattern. _invoke_with_role returns immediately without waiting for emission. Test: test_emission_does_not_block_caller verifies method returns before emission completes.
criteria_verification.notes: Event emission uses asyncio.get_running_loop().create_task(_safe_emit()) — fire-and-forget pattern. _invoke_with_role returns immediately without waiting for emission. Test: test_emission_does_not_block_caller verifies method returns before emission completes.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Emission failure does not propagate to caller
criteria_verification.evidence: The _safe_emit() async wrapper catches all exceptions from emitter.emit() and logs a warning. The outer _emit_llm_call_event() also catches event construction failures. Test: test_emission_failure_does_not_propagate uses a failing emitter (raises RuntimeError) and verifies _invoke_with_role completes without error.
criteria_verification.notes: The _safe_emit() async wrapper catches all exceptions from emitter.emit() and logs a warning. The outer _emit_llm_call_event() also catches event construction failures. Test: test_emission_failure_does_not_propagate uses a failing emitter (raises RuntimeError) and verifies _invoke_with_role completes without error.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: NullEmitter default preserves existing behaviour (no event emission when emitter not injected)
criteria_verification.evidence: AgentInvoker.__init__() defaults emitter parameter to NullEmitter() when None. NullEmitter drops events silently. Tests: test_default_emitter_is_null_emitter verifies default type, test_no_events_captured_without_injected_emitter verifies zero events captured.
criteria_verification.notes: AgentInvoker.__init__() defaults emitter parameter to NullEmitter() when None. NullEmitter drops events silently. Tests: test_default_emitter_is_null_emitter verifies default type, test_no_events_captured_without_injected_emitter verifies zero events captured.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Multiple calls in same turn produce distinct events
criteria_verification.evidence: Each _invoke_with_role() call produces exactly one LLMCallEvent with its own timestamp from datetime.now().isoformat(). Test: test_two_calls_produce_two_events makes two invocations (player + coach) and verifies 2 distinct events with different agent_roles.
criteria_verification.notes: Each _invoke_with_role() call produces exactly one LLMCallEvent with its own timestamp from datetime.now().isoformat(). Test: test_two_calls_produce_two_events makes two invocations (player + coach) and verifies 2 distinct events with different agent_roles.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Existing tests in test_agent_invoker.py still pass (zero regression)
criteria_verification.evidence: All 552 existing agent_invoker tests pass. The emitter parameter defaults to NullEmitter() so all existing callers are unaffected. Ran: pytest tests/unit/test_agent_invoker*.py — 552 passed, 0 failed.
criteria_verification.notes: All 552 existing agent_invoker tests pass. The emitter parameter defaults to NullEmitter() so all existing callers are unaffected. Ran: pytest tests/unit/test_agent_invoker*.py — 552 passed, 0 failed.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: New tests cover: successful emission, error emission, non-blocking behaviour, NullEmitter default
criteria_verification.evidence: 13 new tests in test_llm_call_events.py covering: TestSuccessfulEmission (2 tests), TestErrorEmission (2 tests), TestNonBlockingEmission (1 test), TestEmissionFailureSafe (1 test), TestNullEmitterDefault (2 tests), TestMultipleCallsDistinctEvents (1 test), TestLatencyTracking (2 tests), TestPromptProfile (1 test). All pass.
criteria_verification.notes: 13 new tests in test_llm_call_events.py covering: TestSuccessfulEmission (2 tests), TestErrorEmission (2 tests), TestNonBlockingEmission (1 test), TestEmissionFailureSafe (1 test), TestNullEmitterDefault (2 tests), TestMultipleCallsDistinctEvents (1 test), TestLatencyTracking (2 tests), TestPromptProfile (1 test). All pass.
